summary: EXP-231 PATCH B closes ISS-1433 (WIN-069 c3 H4, moderate, unsourced counter-model). One sentence-scope replacement in WIN-069.detail_evidence adds a concrete citation — Giacomin & Levinson 2015, 'Road network circuity in metropolitan areas,' Environment and Planning B: Planning and Design 42(6):1040–1053, DOI 10.1068/b130131p (verified by web search 2026-04-23) — documenting typical road/geodesic detour indices of ~1.1–1.2 that vary with terrain/network density, not latitude or topology. The terrain-based routing mechanism claim is preserved as the second clause, now anchored to the cited literature. BEFORE string verified unique (count=1). Character delta +274. Per curmudgeon recommendation, a single citation is sufficient to close this defense.
